entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop species being studied for disease resistance.

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A devastating disease of pearl millet caused by Sclerospora graminicola.

entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes downy mildew in pearl millet.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced, which is reduced by downy mildew.

entities.name: FORAGE QUALITY
entities.description: The quality of the crop used as animal feed, deteriorated by downy mildew.

entities.name: DM RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet to resist infection by downy mildew.

entities.name: SIMPLE SEQUENCE REPEAT MARKERS
entities.description: Genetic markers used to construct the linkage map.

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCI
entities.description: Regions of the genome associated with the trait of DM resistance.

entities.name: LINKAGE MAP
entities.description: A genetic map showing the relative positions of markers on chromosomes.

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINES
entities.description: A mapping population developed from a cross of two parent lines.

entities.name: ICMB 89111-P6
entities.description: One of the parent lines used to develop the RIL population.

entities.name: ICMB 90111-P6
entities.description: The resistant parent line used to develop the RIL population.

entities.name: GREENHOUSE TRIALS
entities.description: The experimental setup used to evaluate disease reaction in RILs.

entities.name: LINKAGE GROUPS
entities.description: Groups of markers on the same chromosome in the linkage map.

entities.name: GUJARAT
entities.description: An Indian state from which the Sg445 isolate was sourced.

entities.name: HARYANA
entities.description: An Indian state from which the Sg519 isolate was sourced.

entities.name: RAJASTHAN
entities.description: An Indian state from which the Sg526 isolate was sourced.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the pathotype-isolates were collected.

entities.name: SG445
entities.description: A specific pathotype-isolate of Sclerospora graminicola from Gujarat.

entities.name: SG519
entities.description: A specific pathotype-isolate of Sclerospora graminicola from Haryana.

entities.name: SG526
entities.description: A specific pathotype-isolate of Sclerospora graminicola from Rajasthan.

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding approach used to develop resistant cultivars.
